items.title: Multiple membership payments pending
items.summary: Four membership payment notifications received from VYVE Charlotte, indicating pending patient payments that may need follow-up or system review.
items.actionNeeded: Review pending membership payments and determine if action is needed on payment processing or patient outreach.

items.title: Fellow Team trial expiring soon

items.actionNeeded: Decide whether to renew or cancel the Fellow Team subscription before trial expires.
